function.name: dashboard.service_start
function.description: Start an AI suite service via the dashboard control panel

function.name: dashboard.service_stop
function.description: Stop a running AI suite service via the dashboard control panel

function.name: dashboard.service_status
function.description: Get the current status of a specific AI suite service

function.name: dashboard.service_list
function.description: List all AI suite services with their current running status

function.name: dashboard.gpu_status
function.description: Get GPU utilization, VRAM usage, temperature, and power draw

function.name: dashboard.system_status
function.description: Get overall system status including CPU, RAM, disk usage, and uptime
